A '''sonic pistol''' was a type of [[Sonic weapon/Legends|sonic weapon]] similar to a [[Blaster pistol/Legends|blaster pistol]]. It created a high-intensity sonic blast powerful enough to shatter solid objects and cause devastating injuries.

==Description==
Designed as civilian's response to [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] and [[Sith/Legends|Sith]] using [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsabers]] to deflect their attacks, the sonic pistol fired compressed bolts of pure sound at its target. Though slightly less powerful than standard energy weapons such as [[Blaster/Legends|blasters]] and [[Pulse-wave blaster|pulse-wave weapons]], the sonic pistol was particularly effective against Jedi and Sith because the weapon's sonic bolt bent around the lightsaber, making deflection impossible.<ref name="Knights of the Old Republic Campaign Guide" /> Additionally, the sonic energy was sometimes able to disrupt a target's equilibrium, causing disorientation.<ref name="KOTOR 2 Prima Official Guide" />

===Variants===
While this standard version of sonic pistol did not have a dedicated stun setting, other sonic weapons such as [[Pacnorval Defense Systems, Limited|Pacnorval's]] [[Sd-77 sonic pistol]] did have a [[Stun/Legends|stun]] setting.<ref name="The Essential Guide to Weapons and Technology">''[[The Essential Guide to Weapons and Technology]]''</ref>

A slightly larger version of this weapon was the [[heavy sonic blaster]], while an even larger [[Sonic rifle|rifle version]] was also produced. A notable model of sonic rifle was the [[Geonosian sonic blaster/Legends|Geonosian sonic blaster]], which operated on similar principles as the pistol.
